description: Google's My Business Verifications API lets approved Business Profile integrations manage verification workflows for business locations. It is part of the Google Business Profile API family and is used to fetch verification options, start verification, and inspect verification state.
summary: mybusinessverifications.googleapis.com exposes one REST API, the My Business Verifications API, for managing Google Business Profile location verifications; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found for this domain.
